title: CarPlan De-ionised Water - Batteries & Steam Irons [Energy Class A+++], 5 L (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Produced using a de-ionisation process that removes all dissolved minerals, impurities and other contaminants
Safe for use on all types of surfaces, including paint, glass, and metal as the water is chemical free
De-ionised water is particularly useful in car detailing as it helps to prevent water spots and streaking on surfaces when drying
Perfect for car enthusiasts or professional detailers who want to maintain the appearance of their car and ensure it stays looking like new
It helps prevent furring and scale formation which, over time, could cause damage.
description: CarPlan DIW005 de-ionised water is a highly purified water that is suitable for a wide range of cleaning applications. The water is produced using a de-ionisation process that removes all dissolved minerals, impurities and other contaminants, resulting in a pure and highly-quality water. The water is also chemical-free, making it safe for use on all types of surfaces, including paint, glass, and metal. De-ionized water is particularly useful in car detailing as it helps to prevent water spots and streaking on surfaces when drying. This water is ideal for final rinsing, after washing your car, as it will leave a spot-free finish. It's also suitable for cleaning and maintaining the appearance of car windows, mirrors, and other surfaces. It's perfect for car enthusiasts or professional detailers who want to maintain the appearance of their car and ensure it stays looking like new.
